channel.title: Bujji Bedtime Stories
channel.description: Soft, soothing bedtime stories to help little ones drift off to sleep. Gentle original tales — a sleepy star, a moon that lost its blanket — told in a warm, calming voice with soft music. No loud sounds, no scary bits. Ages 2-8. New story every week.
channel.itunes:summary: Soft, soothing bedtime stories to help little ones drift off to sleep. Gentle original tales — a sleepy star, a moon that lost its blanket — told in a warm, calming voice with soft music. No loud sounds, no scary bits. Ages 2-8. New story every week.
channel.itunes:author: Bujji

item.title: The Star That Couldn't Stop Yawning
item.description: High above a sleeping village, one little star just can't stop yawning… and the kind moon knows exactly what to do. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice + gentle music, no scary bits.
item.itunes:summary: High above a sleeping village, one little star just can't stop yawning… and the kind moon knows exactly what to do. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice + gentle music, no scary bits.

item.title: Bujji and the Moon's Lost Blanket
item.description: Bujji and the Moon's Lost Blanket. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice and gentle music, no scary bits. Follow Bujji Bedtime Stories for a new sleepy tale every week. Sweet dreams.
item.itunes:summary: Bujji and the Moon's Lost Blanket. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice and gentle music, no scary bits. Follow Bujji Bedtime Stories for a new sleepy tale every week. Sweet dreams.
